document_info.document_type: Statement of Values (SOV) / Schedule of Locations

business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate ownership and management; portfolio includes office towers, retail/mercantile centers, and mixed-use developments across major Texas markets

coverages_discussed.notes: Aggregate building value across 8 locations per current SOV. Prior year aggregate building value was 199124688, representing an 11.7% year-over-year increase. Includes pending TIV update per appraisal for Lone Star Property Holdings, LP effective 2026-03-15.
Aggregate contents value across 8 locations per current SOV. Prior year aggregate contents value was 29928511, representing an 11.7% year-over-year increase.
Aggregate BI value across 8 locations per current SOV. BI values were not present in the prior year SOV; this coverage line appears to be newly added or newly scheduled in the current submission.

positives: 5 of 8 locations are Fire Resistive construction; remaining 2 are Masonry Non-Combustible and 1 is Non-Combustible — no wood-frame or combustible construction in portfolio
Majority of portfolio is modern vintage: 6 of 8 buildings constructed between 2001 and 2018

Portfolio concentrated in established, high-quality Texas commercial submarkets: Dallas Uptown/Preston Center, Houston Galleria/Energy Corridor, Plano Legacy, Fort Worth Medical District, and Southlake Town Square
Mix of office and mercantile occupancies provides tenant diversification
Modern roofing systems present across most locations: TPO (LOC-002, LOC-005, LOC-008), Single-Ply Membrane (LOC-003), EPDM (LOC-006), and Concrete (LOC-004)
Total portfolio square footage of approximately 1056000 sq ft provides scale
All locations are multi-story, purpose-built commercial structures
concerns: LOC-006 (Energy Corridor Business Center, Houston) is the oldest building in the portfolio (built 1995) and is Non-Combustible construction — lowest construction class in the portfolio

Overall TIV increased approximately 37.5% year-over-year ($229053199 to $314984000); however, a material portion of this increase is attributable to the addition of BI values ($59212000) not present in the prior year SOV. Building and contents values alone increased approximately 11.7% ($229053199 to $255772000), which should be validated against appraisal support

Pending mid-term modifications effective 2026-03-15 include: (1) addition of a new warehouse facility, (2) deletion of a closed location (lease expired), and (3) a TIV update per appraisal — details on the new warehouse facility (construction, occupancy, values, location) are not provided in this submission

Two locations carry shingle roofing (LOC-001 Preston Center Tower 18-story, LOC-007 Fort Worth Medical Office Building) — shingle roofing on high-rise or multi-story commercial buildings may present wind/hail vulnerability
Houston geographic concentration across three locations (LOC-002, LOC-003, LOC-006) with aggregate TIV of $114408000 creates windstorm and inland flood aggregation exposure
No loss history provided in the submitted documents
Warehouse facility being added is a different occupancy class than the existing portfolio; construction, sprinkler, and valuation details are absent

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Portfolio consists of 8 commercial properties located entirely in Texas. Occupancy types include Office (5 locations: LOC-001, LOC-002, LOC-003, LOC-006, LOC-007) and Mercantile (3 locations: LOC-004, LOC-005, LOC-008). Total portfolio square footage is approximately 1056000 sq ft across buildings ranging from 3 to 18 stories. Construction is predominantly Fire Resistive (LOC-001, LOC-002, LOC-003, LOC-005, LOC-007), with 2 Masonry Non-Combustible locations (LOC-004, LOC-008) and 1 Non-Combustible location (LOC-006). Year built ranges from 1995 to 2018. All locations are sprinklered. A mid-term change effective 2026-03-15 adds a warehouse facility, removes one closed location, and reflects a TIV appraisal update.
